character_designs.name_cn: 肃明虫族小兵多状态角色板
character_designs.identity: Lower-tier Suming / War-Armor Office insect infantry used for village sealing, convoy escort, gate guard, pursuit, and granary patrol

body_and_face.species_lock: Clearly non-human and non-humanoid insect infantry; never a human soldier wearing insect armor.
body_and_face.scale: Approximately 2.0 to 2.3 meters tall in-world, visibly larger than humans but lower-tier than Li Tang.
body_and_face.build: Low-crouched, strong, forward-leaning body with hardened chest and back carapace, long reverse-jointed legs, and clawed feet.
body_and_face.head: Narrow front head with dark compound eyes placed along the brow sides, bone-white mandible guard covering mouthparts, dark flexible neck membrane, and no human face or hair.
body_and_face.back: Degenerated hard wings collapsed into layered armor plates, functioning as back protection rather than decorative wings.
body_and_face.expression: Threat reads through compound-eye glints, mandible guard angle, blade posture, and disciplined geometry rather than human facial acting.

constant_anchors: old iron chest and back harness
dark-green cord or low-rank military tie
small locked Suming/Qingming emblem reference only as physical iron tag, wax stamp, or carapace brand

state_designs.silhouette: Low-crouched guard stance with spear held vertical; disciplined doorway-blocking geometry.
materials: tiny locked-emblem iron or wax mark
state_designs.color_logic: Black-green and deep-brown carapace dominate; bone-white guard and one wax binding mark low-rank institutional control.
state_designs.damage_level: Clean disciplined equipment with scratches and wax cracks only.
required_details: short spear must read as practical guard weapon
old iron harness must not become full human armor
tiny badge reference must stay physical and small

state_designs.name_cn: 押运 / 粮仓守门状态
state_designs.episode_range: grain convoy, granary, and checkpoint scenes
state_designs.silhouette: Slightly broader guarded stance with hook-sickle or short polearm, built for blocking paths and escorting supplies.
materials: old iron chest and back harness
state_designs.color_logic: Old iron and wax-white bindings increase institutional pressure without implying command rank.
state_designs.damage_level: Scuffed but orderly, no gore or ragged cloth.
required_details: hook-sickle or short polearm must be distinct from Li Tang command spear
bindings at elbows and knees show lower military control
no cloth uniform or human boots

state_designs.silhouette: Lower fast forward pose, reverse-jointed legs braced, forearm blades deployed, spear reversed as secondary weapon.
state_designs.color_logic: Dark chitin and old iron dominate; dark-red appears only as restrained blade wear, not gore.
state_designs.damage_level: Blade scratches and blackstone dust only.
required_details: short foldable blades must grow from forearm structure
body remains infantry-tier and not Li Tang commander scale
mandible guard and compound-eye glint remain readable

detail_panels.purpose: Lock the infantry head as non-human and lower-tier.
detail_panels.notes: Narrow side-set dark compound eyes, bone-white mandible guard, no human face or hair.

detail_panels.purpose: Explain retracted and deployed infantry blade mechanism.
detail_panels.notes: Short blades mounted on outer forearm, smaller and less elite than Li Tang's long mantis blades.

detail_panels.purpose: Show lower military binding without human clothing.
detail_panels.notes: Harness restrains chitin body; cord signals low-rank unit control, not command authority.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry faction continuity without redesigning the badge.
detail_panels.notes: Small copied white-wing-over-black-sun physical tag, wax seal, or carapace brand only.

detail_panels.purpose: Differentiate patrol, gate, and pursuit readiness.
detail_panels.notes: One or two white wax bindings, cracked and wrapped around joints, never cloth sleeves.

detail_panels.purpose: Use degenerated wings as armor silhouette.
detail_panels.notes: Small hard wing plates stack like back armor, not decorative wings and not Bai Yi membrane cape.
Long reverse-jointed leg and claw foot with blackstone or village-dust scuffing.
Short spear for patrol, hook-sickle for convoy/gate; both old iron and practical.
Black-green chitin, deep-brown chitin, bone-white guard, insect-wax white, old iron, dark-green cord, cold-gold pin, dark-red blade scratch, blackstone snow dust.
